case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $601.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $601.00 U.S. CURRENCY: $423.43 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

POS OF NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO STRIKE CLAIM OF CHRISTIAN LULE, P & A IN SUPPORT OF MTN TO STRIKE CLAIM OF CHRISTIAN LULE AND DEC OF PAMELA A UNDERWOOD FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF CHRISTIAN LULE ONLY. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PHA) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $601.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JEE FONG HARRY LOW. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER STRIKING THE CLAIM OF CHRISTIAN LULE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA LOW, JEE FONG HARRY
